Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Number-changing fine-graining isometry: h†V₀ fills deficit with Löwdin orthogonalization

V = V₀ + V₂ where V₀ is raw product map and V₂ = (I-Π_{V₀})h†V₀ · G₂^{-1/2}D^{1/2}.
Three-step construction: project out V₀ image, Löwdin-orthogonalize V₂ columns, scale
to fill deficit D = I - V₀†V₀. Gives V†V = I exactly for Fibonacci and Ising with D4.
Number-changing isometry slightly improves intertwining residual vs normalized product.

commit.message:
fix(model-3d): block wall face selector during push-pull to prevent interference

Added 'push-pull' to blocking tools list in handleFaceClick, handleWallClick,
and handleWallDoubleClick — prevents wall face selection from consuming events
during push-pull operations. Also added diagnostic logging to trace the
push-pull flow on wall faces.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(model-3d): make wall face splits visible and push-pull functional

Three root causes fixed:
1. Edge lines: syncMeshFromHEDirect now adds HEMesh-derived edge lines
   to wall meshes after geometry rebuild, making face split boundaries visible
2. Push-pull face detection: RenderWalls hover/click handlers now use
   buildFaceDataFromHE (topology-aware) instead of buildFaceData (coplanar
   scanning), so split faces are distinguished from surrounding wall faces
3. Wall kernel extrude: applyPushPull now has a wall-specific path that
   finds the HEMesh from threeSceneStore.wallHEMeshes and uses kernel
   extrudeFaceThrough/extrudeFaceGroup directly

Also: silent catch blocks in all drawing tools now log errors, and
startPushPullOperation preserves face.objectId for wall targets.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(model-3d): build wall triangleFaceMap without replacing CSG geometry

The previous fix replaced wall geometry via toBufferGeometry round-trip, which
broke rendering because CSG-output geometry (with opening cutouts) can't survive
the HEMesh round-trip. Instead, build the triangleFaceMap manually by matching
each original triangle's centroid to its HEMesh face via findFaceAtPoint. This
preserves the original CSG geometry for rendering while enabling triangle-to-face
lookups for drawing tools.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(validator): cross-domain nested field validation bugs (#41)

## Summary

- Fixed cross-domain nested field validation in strict mode — fields
injected via `nested.domain` into another domain were incorrectly
flagged as unknown
- Added `domainAliases` option to `FormanValidationOptions` allowing
callers to map schema-declared domain names (e.g. `parameters`) to
actual domain keys (e.g. `default`)
- Moved root-level strict unknown-field check to a deferred pass that
runs after all domains are processed, so cross-domain fields are
properly registered
- Prevented duplicate unknown-field errors at collection level for
root-level values (`context.path.length > 0` guard)
- Added comprehensive test suite for cross-domain scenarios including
bidirectional jumps, multi-source merges, alias resolution, and mixed
static + cross-domain fields
- Bumped version to 1.9.5

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Normal Korean/Japanese text passes without false positives.

commit.message:
[fix] Eliminate duplicate status messages — strict message lifecycle

Root cause: refresh() was creating new messages when self.msg was None
(after finalize). Now:

- start(): creates initial status message (called once)
- refresh(): ONLY edits existing message, never creates new ones
- finalize(): converts current msg to permanent, sets msg=None
- new_status(): explicitly creates new msg for next group
- delete(): stops ticker permanently

Message creation is now explicit: start(), new_status() only.
Ticker's refresh() can never spawn duplicates.

Fix CMD+1-9 shortcuts to match sidebar session order (#26)

## Summary

the sidebar (named groups alphabetically → ungrouped, destroyed sessions
last within each group)

`SessionContext`
- Added 9 unit tests covering all ordering scenarios

Closes #4

## Test plan
- [x] `npm run test` — all 1650 tests pass (including 9 new ones)
- [ ] Manual: create sessions in multiple project groups, verify CMD+1-9
matches sidebar order
- [ ] Manual: destroy a session, verify it moves to the end of its group
for shortcuts

commit.message:
fix: bot game loop dying when no players connected

The DO alarm only rescheduled when WebSocket sessions existed, so bots
stopped ticking entirely when nobody was online. Four fixes:

- Always reschedule alarm in a finally block (no session check)
- Start alarm on any DO fetch, not just WebSocket connect
- Reset stale alarms stuck in the past after DO eviction/restart
- Wrap all alarm steps in try-catch so errors don't kill the loop
- Add cron trigger (every minute) to keep DO alive in production
- Health endpoint now pings DO to ensure alarm is running
- Add /admin/force-tick for manual intervention

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

revert: restore original safety timeout logic (keyboard input only)

Admittance-aware timeout changes broke teleop. Reverting to the
working state where only keyboard/joystick input refreshes the
safety timeout.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: illustrate skill not activating on launch + redesign blog-heroes seed images

The illustrate mode's SKILL.md description was too generic for Claude Code's
skill matching to trigger automatically. Updated to match the pattern used by
working modes (doc, slide): "Use for ANY task in this workspace" +
"Consult before your first edit in a new conversation."

Also enriched the claudeMdSection with Architecture and AI Image Generation
sections so the agent has enough context even without the skill loaded.

Regenerated all 5 blog-heroes seed images with cinematic Pneuma aesthetic
(dark background, orange particles, glassmorphism, volumetric lighting).

free_ai: fix MusicGen transformers 5.x compatibility

- Switch from audiocraft to transformers/MusicgenMelodyForConditionalGeneration
- Use AutoProcessor; melody model needs its own class separate from MusicgenForConditionalGeneration
- Pre-resample audio to 32kHz in load_audio_for_conditioning to avoid numpy 2.x/torchaudio dtype bug
- Update spec and setup_env.sh to reflect transformers-based approach
